justification: The issue describes a specific bug where array API utilities return incorrect namespaces and devices when used with DPNP GPU arrays. This directly impacts the functionality of scikit-learn.
current_state_summary: The issue is classified as a bug based on the provided description and evidence. It has been closed but may require re-evaluation if reopened or new information becomes available.
